answer:
The magnetization \( M \) is the dipole moment per unit volume:  
\( M = (10^{-23} \, \text{A m}^2)(10^{27} \, \text{atoms/m}^3) = 10^4 \, \text{A/m} \).  

The surface current density is \( K = M \sin\theta \), where \(\theta = 45^\circ\), so  
\( K = 10^4 \times \sin 45^\circ = 10^4 \times 0.7071 \approx 7070 \, \text{A/m} \).  

Thus, the correct answer is C.  

\boxed{C}
